description: 12-week hypertrophy program prioritising Glutes and Hamstrings. Full body 4x/week split alternating lower-biased and upper-biased sessions. Two blocks of 6 weeks (5 training + 1 deload each).

blocks.structure: Full Body — Day A: Lower + Vertical Pull | Day B: Push + Lower | Day C: Lower + Horizontal Pull | Day D: Hinge + Upper

exercises.notes: Bench pad across hips, drive through heels, 1s squeeze at top
Lean back ~15°, pull elbows to ribs, full stretch at top
Neutral spine, pull to lower ribs, squeeze shoulder blades
Hips flat, curl through full ROM, 1s squeeze, controlled negative
Slight elbow bend, raise to shoulder height, no shrugging
Full supination, controlled negative to full extension, no swinging
Arch naturally, elbows ~45° from torso, bar to lower chest
Rear foot elevated, front shin vertical, lower with control
Straddle cable facing away, hinge at hips (not squat), drive hips forward hard at top
Elbows pinned to sides, full extension, controlled return
Full ROM — deep stretch at bottom, full contraction and 1s pause at top
Raise to shoulder height, feel contraction, no torso lean
Bar across traps, brace core, knees track over toes, sit to parallel
Chest flat on incline bench, pull elbows high, full ROM
30-45° bench only, elbows slightly inside 90°, full ROM
Exploit deep stretch in seated position, full ROM, controlled negative
Wide arc, slight elbow bend, squeeze at close, feel stretch at open
Deep stretch at bottom, full contraction at top, don't rush
Hinge at hips, bar close to legs, feel hamstring stretch, drive hips forward to return
Hinge to ~45°, pull bar to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades
Seated, press from ear height, slight inward arc at top
Full ROM, elbows at sides, controlled negative, no swinging
Full extension, 1s pause at top, controlled lowering
Sit upright, push pads apart through full ROM, slight forward lean for glute med

blocks.structure: Full Body — Day A: Lower + Vertical Pull | Day B: Push + Lower | Day C: Lower + Horizontal Pull | Day D: Hinge + Upper

exercises.notes: Same cues as barbell — bar across hips, drive heels, 1s squeeze at top
Neutral grip allows deeper lat stretch for many — exploit the ROM
Knee on bench, pull elbow to ceiling, full ROM
Seated position maximises hamstring length — use full ROM
Cable maintains tension at the bottom of the arc unlike dumbbells
EZ bar acceptable, full ROM, elbows at sides
30-45° bench, control descent, bar to upper chest
Bar on traps, long stride, back knee nearly touches floor, alternate legs
Straddle cable facing away, hinge at hips (not squat), drive hips forward hard at top
Face away from cable, rope overhead, elbows close to head, full stretch
Feet at bottom edge of platform, full ROM, slow tempo
Slight forward lean, slight elbow bend, raise to shoulder height
Feet shoulder-width, lower position for quad emphasis, full depth
Chest on incline bench, pull elbows high, no momentum
Wider ROM than barbell, slight inward arc at top
Hips flat, full ROM, controlled negative
Adjust seat so handles are chest height, wide arc, squeeze at close
Full ROM, deep stretch at bottom, 1s pause at top
Legs nearly straight (soft knee), maximal hamstring stretch, bar close to body
Bar starts on floor each rep, horizontal torso, explosive pull to lower chest
Start palms in at chin, rotate to palms-forward as you press
Full supination, controlled negative, no swinging
Full extension, 1s hold at top, slow controlled lowering
Full ROM, slight forward lean for glute med, controlled return
